basic_details.short_information: Bihar Electricity Regulatory Commission (BERC) Advisor Notification 2026 has been released on 29 April 2026 on the official website of Bihar Electricity Regulatory Commission. Has been announced through the BERC Advisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 67 years as on 01-05-2026.

qualification.details: Graduate in Engineering with at least 25 years of professional experience in the power sector. Adequate exposure and experience of regulatory work and electricity tariff related matters. Must have worked at the level of Chief Engineer or Director or above before retirement.

selection_process: Comparison of qualifications and experience Interview or interaction (if necessary)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BERC Advisor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.berc.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BERC Advisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BERC Advisor (Tariff and Regulatory Work) post is 21st May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Advisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate in Engineering with at least 25 years of professional experience in the power sector, including regulatory and tariff matters, and should have retired at the level of Chief Engineer or Director or above.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Advisor post is 67 years as of 1st May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Advisor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 1,20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC categories, implying it is Nil.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Part Time.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of BERC?
faq.answer: The official website of Bihar Electricity Regulatory Commission is www.berc.co.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Advisor role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a comparison of qualifications and experience, and an interview or interaction if deemed necessary.
